startup_description: Simple invoice creation and payment tracking tool for freelancers who waste hours on manual invoicing and lose money chasing late payments. Auto-generates professional PDFs, tracks payment status, and sends automated reminders.

hero_answers.Q1_problem_customer: Solo freelancers waste 3-5 hours per week manually creating invoices, tracking which clients have paid, and sending payment reminders. They lose track of overdue invoices and leave money on the table because follow-up is manual and inconsistent. This wastes 15-20 hours per month on admin work (worth $500-1000 of billable time) and loses $1000-2000 per month in late payments they never chase down.
Q2_target_user: Freelance creative professionals (designers, writers, photographers) billing 5-20 clients per month
Solo consultants (business coaches, marketing consultants) with project-based billing
Small service providers (bookkeepers, virtual assistants) managing multiple small clients
hero_answers.Q3_success_metric: Within 30 days: 150 user signups, 50 active users who created at least 1 invoice, 12 paying subscribers, 250+ invoices generated, and $400 MRR proving the subscription model works.
Q4_must_have_features: Invoice generator - Fill simple form, auto-generate branded PDF with logo and line items
Client database - Store client contact info and view complete invoice history
Payment tracker - Dashboard showing unpaid, overdue, and paid invoices with status
Auto-reminders - System sends payment reminder emails 3 days before and 7 days after due date
Quick actions - One-click Mark as Paid and Send Manual Reminder buttons
Q5_non_goals: Stripe payment processing or Pay Now button integration in v1
Recurring invoices or subscription billing features
Multi-currency support or international tax calculations
Expense tracking or full accounting suite

Q6_constraints.brand_positioning: Simple, fast invoicing for freelancers who hate admin work
Q6_constraints.scope: Invoice creation and payment tracking only - no full accounting
Q6_constraints.economics: Monthly subscription $15-49/month with healthy margins after $1-2/user operational costs
Q6_constraints.build_time: 45 days max from start to launch
Q6_constraints.tech_requirements: Multi-tenant data isolation, PDF generation, background job scheduling for reminders

Q7_data_sources: User manual input - All client data, invoice line items, business settings
System-generated - Invoice numbers, timestamps, payment status tracking
No external data sources required for MVP
Q8_integrations: SendGrid or AWS SES - Transactional email for invoice delivery and automated reminders
Stripe - Subscription billing and payment processing
Phase 2: QuickBooks and Xero APIs for accounting software sync
Phase 2: Stripe Checkout for client-facing Pay Now button
Q9_risks: Email deliverability depends on proper SPF/DKIM setup - critical for product success
PDF generation can be finicky with fonts and formatting - allocate buffer time for testing
Multi-tenant data isolation must be bulletproof - one security bug kills trust
Background job reliability for reminders is core feature - cannot fail silently
Competition from established players like FreshBooks and Wave (free tier)
hero_answers.Q10_shipping_preference: Start with core invoice generation, client management, and payment tracking with auto-reminders. No Stripe payment integration or accounting sync until v2. Focus on making the manual invoicing workflow 10x faster than Excel.
